ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES CONCERNING DEISCOVERY WILL TRACK THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE OF MAY 6, 2024, AS REFLECTED ON THE SIGNED ORDER IN OPEN COURT. ALL PARTIES MUST EMAIL ADRCOORDINATOR@SFTC.ORG NO LATER THAN SIX WEEKS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE TO SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT.
